page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores with 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This high memory density makes it a memory-optimized resource. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given its hardware profile, the ecs.hfr8i.32xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU cores and high memory capacity. Suitable applications include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems, heavy data analytics, and memory-bound scientific computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.32xlarge is a memory-optimized, x86_64 architecture server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 6462C physical cores operating at 3.3 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that eliminates hyperthreading overhead. The instance features 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. It contains no local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. High-speed network performance is supported by a 100 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This hardware profile is engineered for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large in-memory databases, data warehousing, and complex analytical processing.
